subject: A tall, pale-blue-skinned angelic attendant figure in white robes holding an ornate staff, depicted with a serene expression and a floating halo above the head
description: A tall, slim figure with pale blue-toned skin stands in a composed three-quarter pose. The figure wears long white robes with decorative trim and holds a tall ornate staff topped with a rounded gem or orb. A circular halo floats above the figure's head. The hair is two-toned and styled distinctively. Energy effects in purple and gold radiate from the staff and background. The expression is calm and composed, conveying serene authority. The background is a dark purple-blue gradient with luminous energy streaks.
foreground: Pale blue-skinned robed figure holding ornate staff with halo above
background: Dark purple-blue with luminous energy streaks
